economic_notes: Nation operates business enterprises including Songhees Development Corporation, Songhees Development LP (which consolidates Songhees Nation Investment Corporation, Songhees Events & Catering, Songhees Tours Inc.), S&S Victoria LP, S&S Bay Center LP, Skungeenes Holdings LLP, 1185869 BC Ltd, 1255063 BC Ltd. COVID-19 noted as impacting operations with office closures and delays in construction projects.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Three trusts consolidated: Songhees James Bay Village Trust, Songhees Cadboro Bay Trust, Songhees Cadboro Bay Settlement Minors Trust. Seven entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs). Prior year had a large one-time gain on restructuring of $5,468,252 which significantly inflated prior year surplus. Accumulated surplus breakdown not fully visible in text (cut off). Tangible capital asset net book value not extractable from provided text. Health and Social Services combined as one segment at $1,094,785; Social component not separately broken out. Local Services expenses $3,651,969 and Community Services $1,242,171 not mapped to standard categories. FNFA debt reserve of $1,212,137 included in restricted cash. Accounts payable includes $1,855,354 payable to minors.
